stemHtml: An aircraft has an ETOPS approval of 180 minutes. Which of the following is correct regarding an ETOPS take-off alternate?

options.a: The take-off alternate can be up to a maximum of 2 hours, at the One Engine Inoperative (OEI) speed and must be nominated on the operational and ATS flight plans.
options.b: The take-off alternate can be up to a maximum of 60 minutes, at the One Engine Inoperative (OEI) speed and must be nominated on the operational and ATS flight plans.
options.c: The take-off alternate can be up to a maximum of 2 hours, at the All Engines speed and must be nominated on the ATS flight plan only.
options.d: The take-off alternate can be up to a maximum of 3 hours, at the One Engine Inoperative (OEI) speed and does not need to be nominated on the operational and ATS flight plans.
